title: Curios Dragon Eggs
description: Dragon Eggs can be worn in a Curios slot and grant configurable effects to the player.
body:
About

This mod makes Dragon Eggs useful by turning them into wearable accessories, granting special effects to the player when equiped.

Features

New Curios slot for the Dragon Egg

Dragon Eggs grant configurable effects

Supports all vanilla potion effects

Configure effects, amplifier levels, duration and cooldown

Media

Configuration

You can adjust every part of the mod through the configuration file.

Show spoiler

Dependencies

This mod has no dependencies.

Installation

Add the .jar mod file into your mods folder.

Alternatively, you can browse the CurseForge launcher for the mod (if it doesn't show up, try typing the autor's name). Once found, click "Install" to add it to your modpack.

Permissions

You are free to include this mod in any modpack, public or private.
